note: Server-side latency = mean `total` ms per vla-server call. Memory = peak VRAM (discrete GPU, nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps). NUMBERS ARE THE PRIOR CONSUMER-GPU (RTX 3060) SWEEP - the only RTX report on record - used as the regression bar for the rtx3090 server: a faster card should meet-or-beat latency, and peak VRAM is model-bound (same weights/graph) so it should be ~equal. Regenerate from a real RTX 3090 sweep once available.
